title: Component Decomposition Node
description: Single node in a recursive component decomposition tree (Wave 7 — Phase 4.2a). Append-only — frozen on creation. status indicates whether this node was further decomposed, met atomic-component criteria, was pruned by the human at the Tier-B mirror gate, was deferred when a safety cap tripped, or was downgraded after a tier mislabel was detected post-gate.

node_id.description: Canonical logical UUID. Stable across revisions of the same logical node.

parent_node_id.description: Parent node's canonical logical UUID, or null at depth 0.

display_key.description: Short human-readable label (LLM's component.id, with a collision suffix if a sibling already uses the same bare label). Presentation-only.

root_component_id.description: The depth-0 root component this node descends from.

tier.description: Wave 7 component tier rubric. A=Macro Subsystem (recurse), B=Bounded Domain (mirror-gate then recurse), C=Module (one more pass), D=Atomic Component (terminal).

responsibilities.description: Verb-led action statements describing what the component is responsible for.

dependencies.description: Other components this one depends on. Each entry references a `component_id` and a `kind` (sync_call / async_event / data_read / data_write).

active_constraints.description: Technical constraint IDs (TECH-*) from Phase 1.0c that anchor this component's implementation choices. Inherited from parent and refined as the tree narrows.

release_id.description: Release assignment (inherited from parent; null = backlog).

release_ordinal.description: Cached ordinal of the assigned release for sort convenience.
